summary: Good audience‑sourced recording with solid sound and standout performances of Althea, Broken Arrow, Stella Blue and the classic China > I Know You Rider sequence.
review: The fans rate this June‑1995 show largely positive, citing a reliable audience tape that “sounds good” and even “A‑quality AUD”.  The concert is praised for its strong second half – Althea, Broken Arrow (with Phil on vocals), Stella Blue and the China > I Know You Rider medley are highlighted as high points.  While Jerry’s guitar work is noted as uneven at times, his voice holds up and overall the performance is considered a safe bet for anyone digging ’95.

ai_rating.rationale: Average star rating ~3.7 across 13 reviews, but most comments are enthusiastic about both the music and the recording; weighting favors show quality, pushing the overall AI rating into the low‑four range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call it "A‑quality AUD" or simply "excellent recording"; no major complaints about dropouts or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans note a consistently moving show with strong highlights in the second half; pacing is described as "moving ahead the whole time" and the last five tunes are especially memorable.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar work described as “up and down” but vocals remain solid despite health concerns.
band_member_comments.Phil: Repeatedly praised for his heartfelt vocal delivery; several reviewers defend his voice as essential to the Dead sound.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mentioned briefly as having a smooth voice, though most focus is on Phil’s singing.
